ddls:
CREATE TABLE "nutritional_attributes" (
  "attribute_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each nutritional attribute */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the nutritional attribute (e.g., Total energy, Carbohydrates) */,
  "unit" TEXT /* Unit of measurement for the attribute (e.g., kcal, g) */,
  "recommended_value" TEXT /* Recommended daily intake value for the attribute */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the attribute and its significance */,
  "source_id" INTEGER /* ID of the source of the recommended daily intake value */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the attribute was added */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for the last update to the attribute */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Boolean to indicate if the attribute is currently active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("attribute_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_nutritional_attributes_source_id FOREIGN KEY ("source_id") REFERENCES sources ("source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "nutritional_data" (
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each nutritional data entry */,
  "attribute_id" INTEGER /* ID of the nutritional attribute being measured */,
  "calculated_value" REAL /* Calculated value of the nutritional attribute */,
  "percentage_of_recommended" REAL /* Percentage of the recommended daily intake value */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who recorded the data */,
  "food_product_id" INTEGER /* ID of the food product for which the data is recorded */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date when the data was recorded */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments about the data entry */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the data was added */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for the last update to the data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_nutritional_data_attribute_id FOREIGN KEY ("attribute_id") REFERENCES nutritional_attributes ("attribute_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_nutritional_data_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_nutritional_data_food_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("food_product_id") REFERENCES food_products ("food_product_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password of the user */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user role */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the user was added */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for the last update to the user */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Boolean to indicate if the user is currently active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES user_roles ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user role */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the user role (e.g., Nutritionist, Researcher, Administrator) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the user role */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* Comma-separated list of permissions for the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "food_products" (
  "food_product_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each food product */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the food product */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the food product */,
  "brand" TEXT /* Brand of the food product */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category of the food product */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the food product was added */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for the last update to the food product */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Boolean to indicate if the food product is currently active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("food_product_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sources" (
  "source_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each source */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the source (e.g., WHO, FDA) */,
  "url" TEXT /* URL of the source */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the source */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the source was added */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for the last update to the source */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Boolean to indicate if the source is currently active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_nutritional_data" (
  "user_data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user-specific nutritional data entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the data entry */,
  "total_energy" REAL /* Total energy intake for the day */,
  "total_carbohydrates" REAL /* Total carbohydrates intake for the day */,
  "total_protein" REAL /* Total protein intake for the day */,
  "total_fat" REAL /* Total fat intake for the day */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments about the data entry */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the data was added */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for the last update to the data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_nutritional_data_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
